steps.title: Calculate the volume of the cube
steps.content: The volume of a cube with edge length 5.000 cm is:$$V = (5.000)^3 = 125.000 \text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Calculate the mass using density
steps.content: With density = 0.250 g/cm$^3$ and volume = 125.000 cm$^3$:$$\text{mass} = 0.250 \times 125.000 = 31.25 \text{ grams}$$
